chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1612 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6874/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.02.2024 Mr. Waheed Ali Samtio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Additional P.G. has pointed out that petitioner seeks quashment of FIR bearing Crime No.154/2023, registered at Police Station Kotdiji, District Khairpur for offences under Section 337-A(iii), 337-A(iv), 337-U, 337-L, 337-A(i), 114, 147, 149, 504, 403 PPC. However, according to Additional P.G., comments have been filed by SHO, Police Station Kotdiji, in which it is mentioned that during investigation the aforesaid FIR has been disposed of under ‘B’ class. In view of above development, Counsel for petitioner doesn’t press this petition any more. It is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
